notes: Dry-run of --action=create exercises argparse, the deterministic sha256-index colour picker, and the stdout wording without needing a token file or the TRP_ALLOW_REMOTE_MUTATE gate. Tag name 'sec-02' hashes to palette slot 5 (bg=#0ea5e9 fg=#ffffff), so any drift in the palette table, the hash-index formula, or the DRY-RUN string moves the recorded bytes.
